## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Environment

- **OrchFlow version**: (check Settings or `package.json`)
- **Node.js version**: (`node --version`)
- **Agent CLI**: Which CLI(s) are you using? (Claude Code / Codex / Copilot)
- **Agent CLI version**: (`claude --version` or equivalent)
